predictions.explanation: Historically high leftovers on pasta days + forecasted low attendance due to warm weather.
Highly popular menu item. Historical logs show student participation is at 95% on wrap days.
Moderate leftovers expected. Tacos are popular but side portions are often over-prepared.
Soup days historically have higher plate waste from younger grade levels.
High attendance expected as it is the final day before the weekend.

recommendations.title: Reduce pasta portion size by 15%
recommendations.description: Pasta Carbonara shows consistently high plate leftovers. Adjusting the portion size slightly reduces waste without affecting student satisfaction.

recommendations.title: Prepare 10% fewer soup bowls
recommendations.description: Our AI model predicts a drop in attendance on Thursday. Pre-serving fewer bowls saves soup for next-day repurposing.

recommendations.title: Switch garlic bread to self-serve basket
recommendations.description: Pre-plating bread leads to untouched slices being discarded. Let students take garlic bread as they pass the counter.
recommendations.suggestedChange: Change from pre-plated to self-serve basket
